chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 56 of 2020 High Court Appeal No. 57 of 2020 High Court Appeal No. 58 of 2020 High Court Appeal No. 67 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply at ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.493/2020. 14.11.2023 Mr. Mujtaba Sohail Raja, advocate for the appellant............. Counsel for the appellant submits that by virtue of the order for withdrawal of the suits unconditionally these appeals have become infructuous. In view of the above, Mr. Mujtaba Sohail Raja advocate, does not press all these appeals. Accordingly all these appeals are dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E
